positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of mystical forest fauna (deer, owl, fox) interwoven with celestial mandalas and geometric crystalline formations. The style should mimic sophisticated stained glass mixed with Art Nouveau linework, featuring bold silhouettes and intricate patterns. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, and muted gold leaf accents. Central composition, suitable for screen printing or embroidery, extreme clarity, vector art style, flat lay perspective, maximal detail.
